0.0.1.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/xoric713/MP3_AP/commits/0.0.1

Proof of concept release, base functionality with custom inventory, gated zones and a focus on modularity to allow for community contributions.
0.0.1.title: Mario Party 3 Archipelago - Proof of Concept

v0.0.2.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/xoric713/MP3_AP/compare/0.0.1...v0.0.2

-- Added options for setting characters, setting game length and having progressive turns
-- Added better goals tuned towards the end of the board (either get all your progressive turns or get the zone 6 key)
-- fixed an issue with YAML Generation due to version mismatch oversight
--fixed the lua bug by properly setting local reference instead of lua's default

1) MarioParty3.apwrold -> Archipelago/custom_worlds
2)unzip lua, open the folder inside, put connector_MP3.lua and the boards folder into Archipelago/data/lua
should look like:
data-\
     lua-\
          boards-\
          connector_MP3.lua
3) load AP Test Board V0.0.2.json onto Mario Party 3 using Party Planner.

4)when Opening the game to connect to a room, start the game first, then load the lua, the lua will throw an error if it tries to run without the N64 core. if you do load lua first, just load the game and toggle the lua.
5)Right now, the safest way to resume play is from the start of the board, don't load save states between sessions of Mario Party, and rebooting the core seems to throw an error. if you do need to reboot, close the game and client and relaunch.
v0.0.2.title: Mario Party 3 Archipelago - Turns and Characters
